untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of impulse-retracement-impulse pattern, multiple consecutive new highs, and distance from exhaustion levels. These pattern-recognition and lookback conditions cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators without array indexing or pattern detection functions.
translation_notes: Translated trend confirmation (ADX > 25) and momentum filters (RSI not extreme). Entry assumes retracement phase detection is handled externally. Exit conditions use ADX weakening and RSI extremes as specified. ADX threshold set to 25 as standard trend strength threshold. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal, though actual trading would be directionally biased based on impulse direction.
